case_title: WEST AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY VS. SIMEX INTERNATIONAL, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEST AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMEX INTERNATIONAL, INC. $15,162.48 PRINCIPAL, $1,200.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $4,922.61 INTEREST, $455.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,740.09, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100169750)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AND (2) 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR QUANTURM MERUIT ONLY (TRANSACTION ID # 100169750) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WEST AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-05-2021 CONTINUED TO JAN-04-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $455.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100169750) AS TO DEFENDANT SIMEX INTERNATIONAL, INC.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 100120094) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF WEST AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SIMEX INTERNATIONAL, INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-04-2022 CONTINUED TO MAY-03-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-03-2022 CONTINUED TO AUG-09-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED (TRANSACTION ID # 66706697) AS TO DEFENDANT SIMEX INTERNATIONAL, INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-05-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-09-2022 CONTINUED TO NOV-08-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEST AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SIMEX INTERNATIONAL, INC. DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-22-2021
